tasks.title: Audit and fix runner coverage in tests, output parsing, and resume behavior for all 7 supported runners
evidence: User request: Check all runner associated tests and ensure all supported runners are being included in the tests
CRITICAL BUG: Output parsing is NOT capturing all proper outputs from different runner types - content after ':' character is being truncated/lost
Example kimi runner output showing missing capture: [Reasoning] Now let me update the queue.json with the new task. I need to insert it at position 1 (after the currently doing task RQ-0457).
The kimi output shows '[Reasoning]' prefix but content after colons in lines like 'Key findings cited in evidence:' is not being fully captured
CRITICAL BUG: Resume/continue behavior is BROKEN for kimi runner - uses unsupported '--resume' flag
Kimi error: 'No such option: --resume Did you mean --yes?' - run_kimi_resume() at runners.rs line 347 uses '--resume' which kimi doesn't support
Each runner may have different resume/continue mechanisms that need individual verification
Supported runners: codex, opencode, gemini, claude, cursor, kimi, pi (7 total)
task_cmd_test.rs test_task_build_options_all_runners() only covers 4 runners (Codex, Opencode, Gemini, Claude) - missing cursor, kimi, pi
task_cmd_test.rs lines 376-379 test only covers 4 runners - missing cursor, kimi, pi
scan_cmd_test.rs lines 59-62 only covers 4 runners (Codex, Opencode, Gemini, Claude) - missing cursor, kimi, pi
runner_cli_inventory_script_test.rs lines 103, 161 only tests 5 runners (codex, opencode, gemini, claude, agent) - missing kimi, pi
Runner enum defined in contracts/config.rs includes all 7 variants
response.rs has extract_kimi_assistant_text() but may have issues with kimi format variations
stream.rs extract_display_lines() handles kimi format at lines 454-480 but may not capture all output types
runners.rs defines resume functions for all runners but CLI flags may not be correct for all (kimi confirmed broken)
plan: INVESTIGATE: Use debug commands to capture actual runner outputs and compare against parsing logic:

- kimi: kimi --print --output-format stream-json --verbose --prompt 'Say hello. Then connect to repo prompt and get the file tree. Then run a bash command to list files in this repo. then send I'm done now and exit' 2>&1 | tee /tmp/kimi-exec-verbose.log

- codex: codex exec --json 'Say hello. Then connect to repo prompt and get the file tree. Then run a bash command to list files in this repo. then send I'm done now and exit' 2>&1 | tee ./tmp/codex-exec.log
- Run equivalent commands for opencode, gemini, claude, cursor, pi to understand their output formats
AUDIT: Resume/continue behavior for ALL 7 runners - check each runner's actual resume support:
- Document which runners support session resumption vs which require fresh runs
- codex: supports 'exec resume <thread_id>' subcommand - VERIFIED
- opencode: uses '-s <session_id>' flag - NEEDS VERIFICATION
- gemini: uses '--resume <session_id>' flag - NEEDS VERIFICATION
- claude: uses '--resume <session_id>' flag - NEEDS VERIFICATION
- kimi: DOES NOT support '--resume' flag - ERROR CONFIRMED - find correct mechanism or disable resume
- pi: uses '--resume <session_id>' flag - NEEDS VERIFICATION
- cursor/agent: uses '--resume <session_id>' flag - NEEDS VERIFICATION
FIX: Resume/continue behavior based on audit findings:
- For kimi: Either find correct resume mechanism OR disable resume support in Ralph
- For all runners: Verify resume CLI flags match actual runner capabilities
- Update runners.rs resume functions to use correct flags for each runner
- Update cli_spec.rs if needed for runner-specific resume option handling
- Add feature detection to skip resume for runners that don't support it
FIX: Update output parsing in response.rs and stream.rs:
- Fix any truncation issues with content containing ':' characters
- Ensure all 7 runner formats are correctly parsed for both extraction AND display
- Add support for any missing output formats (tool results, reasoning blocks, etc.)
UPDATE TESTS: Expand test coverage to include all 7 runners:
- Update test_task_build_options_all_runners() in task_cmd_test.rs to include all 7 runners
- Update second runner test in task_cmd_test.rs to include all 7 runners
- Update scan_cmd_test.rs runner test to include all 7 runners
- Update runner_cli_inventory_script_test.rs to include kimi and pi fake runners
ADD TESTS: Create comprehensive runner tests:
- Output parsing tests with realistic captured output samples for each runner
- Resume/continue behavior tests with session tracking
- CLI flag verification tests for each runner's supported options
VERIFY: Run make ci to verify all tests pass with expanded coverage and fixes
notes: DEBUGGING REFERENCE: Use these commands to capture actual runner outputs:
RESUME AUDIT: Check each runner's help for resume/session options:
ISSUE: kimi --resume flag is WRONG - kimi doesn't support this flag
SCOPE: This task now covers 3 areas: test coverage, output parsing, AND resume behavior
tasks.request: Expand task to also audit resume/continue behavior for ALL runners. The kimi runner fails with 'No such option: --resume' error, indicating the resume CLI flags in runners.rs may be incorrect for some runners.

tasks.title: Implement subtask support for hierarchical task breakdown
evidence: No parent/child relationship fields in Task schema
Large tasks cannot be broken down into trackable subtasks
PRD multi-task mode creates sequential dependencies but not true subtasks
plan: Add `parent_id` field to Task for child-to-parent reference
Add `subtasks` array field or compute dynamically from parent_id
Add `ralph task subtask create <PARENT_ID> <REQUEST>` command
Update parent task progress based on subtask completion percentage
Block parent task completion until all subtasks are done
Update TUI to show collapsible subtask hierarchies
Update queue graph to show parent-child relationships
Add tests for subtask lifecycle and parent completion blocking

tasks.title: Add webhook support for task event notifications
evidence: No webhook configuration in config schema
No outgoing notification system for task events
Only desktop notifications are supported (local machine only)
plan: Add webhook configuration to config schema (URL, events, secret)
Create webhook module for async HTTP POST delivery
Support events: task_created, task_started, task_completed, task_failed
Add retry logic with exponential backoff for failed deliveries
Add webhook signature verification using configured secret
Add `ralph webhook test` command to verify configuration
Document webhook payload format and retry behavior

tasks.title: Implement GitHub Issues bidirectional sync integration
evidence: No GitHub integration commands exist in the CLI
Manual task creation from issues is repetitive
No way to sync task status back to GitHub issues
plan: Add `ralph sync github import` to create tasks from GitHub issues
Support filtering by labels, milestones, assignees
Add `ralph sync github export` to create GitHub issues from tasks
Add `ralph sync github bidirectional` for two-way sync
Store GitHub issue URL in task custom_fields for tracking
Add config for GitHub token and default repository
Handle rate limiting and pagination for large issue sets
Add tests with mock GitHub API responses

tasks.title: Add multi-select support to TUI for batch operations
evidence: TUI only supports single task selection with arrow keys
No way to select multiple tasks for batch archive or status change
Command palette has no multi-select actions
plan: Add Space key to toggle task selection in list view
Add visual indicator for selected tasks (checkmark or highlight)
Add `a` key for batch archive of selected tasks
Add `s` key for batch status change with submenu
Add `d` key for batch delete with confirmation
Show selection count in footer when tasks are selected
Add Esc key to clear selection
Update help overlay with multi-select keybindings

tasks.title: Implement task queue import/export for backup and migration
evidence: Export exists but only for CSV/TSV/JSON formats without full task data
No import command to restore queue from backup
No migration path between different queue formats or versions
plan: Add `ralph queue import <FILE>` command supporting JSON and CSV
Support import with ID remapping to avoid conflicts
Add `--dry-run` flag to preview import without changes
Support merging imported tasks with existing queue
Add validation of imported tasks against schema
Create backup of existing queue before import
Add tests for import with various edge cases (duplicates, invalid data)

tasks.title: Add task comments/audit trail for collaboration
evidence: Task has notes field but no structured comment history
No way to track who made changes and when (for multi-user scenarios)
Notes field is just strings, no timestamp or author attribution
plan: Add `comments` array field to Task with timestamp, author, text
Add `ralph task comment <TASK_ID> <TEXT>` command
Auto-append comments on status changes with optional note
Show comments in `ralph task show` output with newest first
Add comments view to TUI task detail panel
Add `--comments` flag to include comments in queue export
Add tests for comment CRUD operations

tasks.title: Add conditional task execution based on custom conditions
evidence: No conditional execution support in task schema
Cannot skip tasks based on file existence, env vars, or command output
All tasks in queue are attempted regardless of context
plan: Add `condition` field to Task with type and parameters
Support condition types: file_exists, env_set, command_success, task_status
Add `ralph task condition <TASK_ID> <TYPE> <PARAM>` command
Evaluate condition before task execution in run one/loop
Skip task with log message if condition not met
Add `--skip-conditions` flag to bypass condition checks
Add tests for each condition type

tasks.title: Implement local LLM runner support (Ollama, llama.cpp)
evidence: Only cloud runners supported: codex, opencode, gemini, claude, cursor, kimi, pi
No local LLM option for offline or privacy-sensitive work
Runner architecture appears extensible for new runner types
plan: Add `ollama` runner type with HTTP API integration
Add `llamacpp` runner type for llama.cpp server
Support local model selection (e.g., codellama, mistral)
Add config options for local LLM endpoint URLs
Implement streaming response handling for local runners
Add timeout and retry logic appropriate for local inference
Document setup instructions for Ollama and llama.cpp
Add tests with mock local LLM servers

tasks.title: Add task automation rules and triggers
evidence: No automation system for trigger-based actions
Manual intervention required for common workflows (status changes, tagging)
No way to auto-assign tags based on task title patterns
plan: Add automation rules to config schema (trigger, condition, action)
Support triggers: on_task_created, on_status_change, on_tag_added
Support actions: add_tag, set_priority, set_status, add_comment
Add pattern matching for titles (regex support)
Implement automation engine that evaluates rules on queue mutations
Add `ralph automation test` to preview rule matches without applying
Add automation execution log for debugging
Document automation rule examples

tasks.title: Implement velocity tracking and sprint planning features
evidence: reports.rs has burndown but no velocity metrics
No sprint/iteration concept in task schema
No way to track team capacity or predict completion dates
plan: Add `sprint` field to Task for iteration grouping
Add `ralph sprint create <NAME> --start <DATE> --end <DATE>`
Add `ralph sprint list` showing active and past sprints
Calculate velocity as tasks/points completed per sprint
Add velocity chart showing trend over sprints
Add sprint burndown separate from overall burndown
Add capacity planning based on historical velocity
Add tests for sprint calculations and velocity metrics

tasks.title: Add interactive context init and update wizards
evidence: docs/cli.md shows `--interactive` flag for context init/update as 'not yet implemented'
Context creation requires manual editing of AGENTS.md
No guided wizard for updating specific sections
plan: Implement `ralph context init --interactive` wizard
Guide user through project type selection with descriptions
Prompt for key configuration values (runner, model, CI command)
Preview generated AGENTS.md before writing
Implement `ralph context update --interactive`
Show list of sections that can be updated
Allow interactive input for new learnings per section
Add tests for interactive prompts and output validation

tasks.title: Add task splitting command to break down large tasks
evidence: No command to split a task into subtasks
Large tasks require manual creation of replacement tasks
No preservation of original task context when breaking down
plan: Add `ralph task split <TASK_ID>` command
Mark original task as split (new status or custom field)
Create child tasks linked via parent_id (depends on subtask feature)
Preserve original scope, evidence, plan in parent task
Distribute plan items across child tasks
Add `--interactive` mode to guide splitting process
Add `--number <N>` to create N empty child tasks
Update docs/cli.md with split examples

tasks.title: Implement IDE extensions for VS Code and JetBrains
evidence: No IDE extensions exist for Ralph
Users must switch between terminal and editor to check task status
No inline task creation from TODO comments in code
plan: Create VS Code extension with task tree view
Show current task, queue, and done tasks in sidebar
Add commands: run task, mark done, create task from selection
Highlight TODO/FIXME comments with quick-create task actions
Create JetBrains plugin with equivalent functionality
Support task status indicators in editor gutter
Add configuration for ralph binary path
Document installation and usage for both extensions
